description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Include a before_script that runs "docker info" and logs in to registry.gitlab.com with the CI job token. Add a build_image_dev job that only runs on the dev branch, executes "npm install", "sudo npm install -g @angular/cli", "npm run build:dev", builds a Docker image tagged registry.gitlab.com/codingstones1/ndi-front:latest, pushes it, clones https://gitlab.com/codingstones1/ndi-playbook, and runs an Ansible playbook with the dev inventory (deploy_front_dev.yaml). Add a build_image_prod job that only runs on the master branch, runs "npm install", "sudo npm install -g @angular/cli", "npm run build", builds a Docker image tagged registry.gitlab.com/codingstones1/ndi-front:stable, pushes it, clones the same playbook repository, and runs the Ansible playbook with the prod inventory (deploy_front_prod.yaml).
